name: Reparied Workflow - Hybrid Score Cover Letter

parameters.name: User-Agent
parameters.value: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/137.0.0.0 Safari/537.36

nodes.name: Append Company details in Result Sheet

parameters.text:
=You are a resume-job matching assistant.

Return only valid JSON:
{"score":0}

Rules:
- score must be an integer from 0 to 100
- do not add markdown
- do not add code fences
- do not add explanations
- do not add extra keys
- be strict and evidence-based
- do not assume skills that are not shown in the resume
- prioritize Python, AI automation, APIs, deployment, workflow tools, data processing, and business automation only if the job description requires them

Resume:
{{ String($('Extract from File').item.json.text || '').slice(0, 1800) }}

Job Description:
{{ String($('Company Details').item.json.description || $json.description || '').slice(0, 1400) }}

assignments.name: scoringError
assignments.value: ={{ $json.error?.message || $json.message || 'All score providers failed or returned invalid JSON' }}

parameters.text:
=You are a professional cover letter assistant.

Return only valid JSON:
{"coverletter":""}

Rules:
- write exactly 2 paragraphs
- separate paragraphs with \n\n
- each paragraph should be detailed and role-specific
- no greeting
- no closing
- no markdown
- no bullet points
- do not invent skills, experience, tools, or achievements
- use only the resume and the job description
- keep the writing focused on the strongest relevant matches

Resume:
{{ String($('Extract from File').item.json.text || '').slice(0, 2200) }}

Job Description:
{{ String($('Company Details').item.json.description || $json.description || '').slice(0, 1600) }}

Match Score:
{{ $('If Generate Cover Letter').item.json.score }}
